sampleRows.item: Phase I and Phase II detox explanation
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample explains detoxification as a liver-centered multi-step process, describes Phase I CYP enzymes, then Phase II pathways including UGT enzymes, NAT2 acetylation, glutathione, and GSTP1.
sampleRows.description: Observed on page 3. The page links variants in CYP1A1, CYP2E1, CYP1B1, CYP2D6, UGT1A1, NAT2, and GSTP1 to environmental or chemical sensitivity examples with reference markers.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Naturopath Summary sibling supplement/wellness output-structure evidence from the Detox Pathway sample PDF. Extracted from the sample PDF text layer for page 3; this is observed explanatory copy, not local detoxification-capacity validation. This is not a direct Naturopath Summary sample report and not local detoxification capacity, toxin sensitivity, methylation status, nutrient status, lab interpretation, supplement guidance, diet guidance, medication guidance, pregnancy guidance, diagnosis, treatment, prevention, or actionability evidence.

professionalReview: Do not use this local fixture to change medications, supplements, diet, lab testing, exposure-avoidance plans, pregnancy decisions, prevention plans, or treatment decisions.

Bring current symptoms, diet history, supplement list, medication list, allergies, labs, prior testing, family history, exposure context, pregnancy context when relevant, and ancestry context to a qualified professional if discussing this topic.
